summary: Completed backend + frontend regression for newly added auth flows: Daftar tab/form, Lupa Password tab/form, student change-password card/flow, admin dashboard change-password card visibility, unified login, and mobile auth usability.
action_items: Optional: resolve react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in src/App.js to keep production build warning-free.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking auth regressions found in requested scope.
Frontend build passes, but two non-blocking React Hook dependency warnings remain in App.js.
seed_data_creation: Created transient student accounts via /api/auth/register-student during backend and UI runs for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth additions are working on public URL. Verified: register auto-login, forgot-password submit behavior, student change-password functional (re-login with new password), admin change-password card visible on dashboard, and mobile auth tabs/form usable at 390x844.
rca of the issue: No feature defect found in this scope. One temporary mobile Playwright failure was due to existing logged-in session redirecting to admin shell instead of login screen; clearing storage resolved it, indicating test-state artifact rather than product bug.
